meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to master user onboarding and overcome a lack of portfolio. A beginner-level checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional apps.
content.answer_block: Transform your lack of a portfolio into a competitive advantage by building high-conversion user onboarding flows. By mastering this single, high-impact feature, you demonstrate enterprise-grade UX skills, solve a critical pain point for clients, and create a repeatable, impressive asset that showcases your technical proficiency and design intuition immediately.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio is the silent killer of freelance careers. You have the skills, but without a concrete artifact to show prospective clients, you are just another voice in the noise. The industry doesn't care about your resume; it cares about the friction you can remove from a user's first sixty seconds in a product.

User onboarding is the hidden lever of SaaS growth. When you master the art of the 'First Time User Experience' (FTUE), you aren't just writing code—you are architecting revenue. This guide uses Antigravity and Claude Code to turn your lack of experience into a showcase of high-end, production-ready engineering that clients will pay to replicate.

steps.title: Define the Value-Driven Onboarding Path
steps.description: Identify the 'Aha!' moment of your app and map a 3-step path to get the user there. Avoid feature bloat; focus on immediate utility.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-conversion onboarding flow schema that guides a user from signup to their first successful task completion in under 60 seconds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create a 3-step onboarding component with progress tracking and state management'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Progress Tracking
steps.description: Users drop off when they feel lost. Add a progress indicator to keep them committed to the setup process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a sleek, responsive progress stepper component that integrates with a React state machine to track onboarding completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/components/Stepper.tsx --prompt 'Add dynamic step indicators and completion animation'

steps.title: Build Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Use tooltips to explain complex features only when the user interacts with them, keeping the interface clean.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable contextual tooltip hook that triggers on hover and supports dynamic content injection based on user role.

steps.title: Integrate Data-Driven Personalization
steps.description: Capture user preferences during onboarding to tailor the dashboard experience immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design an onboarding form that updates the user profile object in Supabase based on selection, triggering a conditional dashboard render.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Link onboarding form inputs to Supabase user metadata update function'

steps.title: Final QA and Friction Audit
steps.description: Test the onboarding flow for speed and errors to ensure a seamless experience for your future clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a friction audit on the current onboarding flow and suggest three specific code optimizations to reduce load time and bounce rates.

pro_tips: Never ask for more than three inputs during onboarding; it increases bounce rates by 40%.
Use 'optimistic UI updates' to make the onboarding flow feel instantaneous, even if the backend is processing.
Always include a 'Skip' button; forcing users through a tour they don't want is a sign of amateur UX.
Store onboarding state in local storage to allow users to resume if they refresh or lose connection.
Style your onboarding with a distinct visual language—different from the main app—to signal a 'guided experience'.
resources: UX Design Patterns for SaaS: https://ui.dev/patterns
content.next_steps: After completing this onboarding flow, deploy your project to Vercel and record a 60-second screen capture of the flow to pin to your portfolio site.
content.conversion_block: You now have a high-value project that proves your ability to ship professional, user-centric software. Stop waiting for the perfect opportunity and start building the proof you need to command higher freelance rates. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
